title: Chengalamma Parameshwari Temple
tagline: Chengalamma Parameshwari Temple — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Chengalamma Parameshwari Temple is located in Sullurpeta town of Tirupati district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.
overview.description: Chengalamma Parameshwari Temple is located in Sullurpeta town of Tirupati district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located at the southern tip of Sullurpeta, on the banks of Kalangi river. The temple is situated 79 km, 84 km and 97 km from Chennai, Tirupati and Nellore respectively. It was established during the fourth and fifth centuries.

topPlaces.name: Sullurpeta mandal
topPlaces.description: Sullurpeta mandal is one of the 36 mandals in Tirupati district of the state of Andhra Pradesh, India. It is the headquarters of the Sullurupeta revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Sullurpeta
topPlaces.description: Sullurupeta is a town in Tirupati district of Andhra Pradesh, India. It is a municipality and the headquarters of Sullurpeta mandal and Sullurupeta revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Nelapattu
topPlaces.description: Nelapattu is a small village in Doravarisatram mandal, Tirupati district, Andhra Pradesh, India. It is within 10 km of the town of Sullurpeta.

topPlaces.name: Mangalampadu
topPlaces.description: Mangalampadu is a village in Tirupati district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Sullurpeta mandal.

topPlaces.name: Mavillapadu
topPlaces.description: Mavillapadu is a village in Varadaiahpalem mandal in Tirupati district in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chengalamma Parameshwari Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chengalamma Parameshwari Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chengalamma Parameshwari Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tirupati Airport (51 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (64 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chengalamma Parameshwari Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chengalamma Parameshwari Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chengalamma Parameshwari Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chengalamma Parameshwari Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chengalamma Parameshwari Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sullurpeta mandal, Sullurpeta, Nelapattu, Mangalampadu, Mavillapadu.
